title: Hell on Earth - Clothes and Utility
body:
[**DOWNLOAD CURIOS API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

![download curios api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0e40d5acbd15f01e984639936767e63bc2c701.png)

_(mod supports russian language as well as english)_

So this is a simple mod made with MCreator, for my own use, but if you want to add it in your zombie-style modpack - you are welcome, I Might port it to newer versions, but probably i won't.

Hell on Earth adds new clothes to the game, like T's, Hoodies, Sneakers and etc. Also it adds items for crafting, food items and some weapons.

NONE OF CLOTHINGS, WEAPONS OR FOOD HAVE THEIR CRAFT (for now) 


It also adds the new biome - Radioactive, where you can only go with gasmask on, it's looking awful, but it's intended to be in the custom world, so yeah.

![Radioactive biome](https://i.imgur.com/LB9T5K1.jpg)

# UTILITY ITEMS

![Some Utility items](https://i.imgur.com/08CA25B.png)

Items made only for role-play purposes, and logs, tape, nails don't have their craft. However, you can craft planks with 1 log and a jigsaw. Scrap with empty cans and a knife. You can scrap clothings into cloth with knife. Also you can make piles with 3 logs, 4 planks, 4 cloth or 4 scrap. Also you can combine nails and a bat to get a nailed bat, which is more effective.

# FOOD ITEMS
You can open canned foods with a knife, or just by pressing rmb on ground with the smaller cans. Other food items can be opened same as small cans.

# CLOTHINGS

![Some clothes i put on the player](https://i.imgur.com/a6H9X3R.png)

There are bags in the mod, which you can open by pressing rmb, but you can't open a bag, when you have 2 of them. Also you can wear them in Curios slots.

Also there is a military vest which provides you with Resistance I, or if it's weared with a military helmet - Resistance II. 

Gasmask is only useful for travelling in the radioactive biome, so you won't die there.
